item.title: Everytime you guys see Pia out and about it’s because I’ve had to grab her. This is something we are working on. In cat hoarding situations a lot of the times they find safety in numbers & other cats. It’s the only thing they find comfort in. Luckily Pia
item.description: By @theferalcatlady0: Everytime you guys see Pia out and about it’s because I’ve had to grab her. This is something we are working on. In cat hoarding situations a lot of the times they find safety in numbers & other cats. It’s the only thing they find comfort in. Luckily Pia
